autowork.configuration.machinesWorkOnlyO: [WIP] Machines work only on pulse redstone signal
autowork.configuration.newRedstoneDetect: New redstone detection. May be better than older, may be buggier than older
itemhelp.autowork.wrench: Sometimes machines freeze (mostly because of crashes). Use wrench to make them tick again.
blockhelp.autowork.breeze_collector.deta: When powered, sucks in all items in front of it and puts them in storage behind
blockhelp.autowork.buffer.details: Can hold 9 stacks. Right-click with item in your hand to put it in buffer or right-click without item to get last stack of buffer
blockhelp.autowork.buffered_breeze_colle: When powered, sucks in all items in front of it and puts them in internal storage
blockhelp.autowork.cartloader.top: Storage of minecarts with chest required
blockhelp.autowork.cartloader.details: Spawns a minecart if both storages are provided; then puts contents of the storage behind into minecart
blockhelp.autowork.buffered_cartloader.d: Spawns a minecart if both storages are provided; then puts contents of its storage into minecart
blockhelp.autowork.buffered_cartunloader: When minecart passes by, Cart Unloader will unload it: all its contents would be transferred to the internal storage
blockhelp.autowork.railway.details: Detects minecart, can filter them by name if sign is placed
blockhelp.autowork.toggler.details: Works like copper bulb but has one side with output; it emits signal when bulb is lit
blockhelp.autowork.cartunloader.details: When minecart passes by and both storages are provided, Cart Unloader will unload it: all its contents would be transferred to the storage behind, and the minecart itself would appear in the storage above
blockhelp.autowork.distributor.master.fr: When 'Master': scans the nodes in front of it
blockhelp.autowork.distributor.node.fron: When 'Node': points at the target storage
blockhelp.autowork.distributor.addition: All 'Nodes' should face the same direction (and storages) and 'Master' should face them
blockhelp.autowork.distributor.details: Evenly distributes items between storages using nodes
blockhelp.autowork.drill.details: Destroys the block using given tool; all drops are collected in the internal storage
blockhelp.autowork.drill.addition: Right-click to put/extract item from drill
blockhelp.autowork.extractor.details: Transfers items from the storage in back to the storage in front
blockhelp.autowork.filterchute.addition1: Right-click with item to change filter
blockhelp.autowork.placer.details: Places blocks from its storage in front of itself
blockhelp.autowork.ticker.details: Rename clock to format: XmYsZt and then right-click the Ticker with it to set its timer
blockhelp.autowork.transmitter.back: When powered: shoots signal entity from front
blockhelp.autowork.transmitter.details: Used in cases when you need to transfer redstone signal by air
blockhelp.autowork.andgate.details: Emits signal only when both sides are powered
